pr.title: release-26.2: roachtest/import: handle cancel-after-publish race in cancellation test
pr.body:
Backport 1/1 commits from #170281 on behalf of @cockroach-teamcity.

----

When an IMPORT INTO job completes and publishes the table descriptor
just before a cancellation request arrives, the job transitions to
canceled status but the OnFailOrCancel handler skips the revert
(TRUNCATE) because TablePublished is already true. The test's canceled
case handler assumed data was always rolled back, so the next import
attempt would re-import the same files, causing key collisions.

Fix this by detecting when a canceled import left data in the table
(indicating it published before cancellation). When this race is
detected, TRUNCATE the table to restore a clean state and reset the
file list so the next attempt reimports all files from scratch.

Resolves: #170035
Epic: none

Release note: None

Generated by Claude Code Auto-Solver
Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
